sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n19548" key="basileu/twr" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βᾰσῐλ-εύτωρ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ορος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n19548.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">βασιλεύς</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0239.tlg002:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antim.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
